queryType.description: Kind of fabric query that was executed.

objectType.description: Object type the query targeted, if applicable.

degraded.description: True if the query was served from a degraded / partial fabric.

ontologyVersion.description: Ontology graph version the query resolved against.

description:
Data payload for `fabric.query` audit events — records a query against the
data fabric / ontology, including whether the result was served degraded.
